allow: Bash(node -e "const m = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('D:/project/public/data/TEM/1/fans/line2.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('profile:', m.profile, 'phi:', m.phi\); console.log\('positions len:', m.positions.length, '\(expect', m.cols*m.rows*3, '\)'\); console.log\('colors len:', m.colors.length, '\(expect', m.cols*m.rows*4, '\)'\); console.log\('indices len:', m.indices.length, '\(expect', 2*\(m.cols-1\)*\(m.rows-1\)*3, '\)'\); console.log\('sample vertex 0: pos=', m.positions.slice\(0,3\), 'color=', m.colors.slice\(0,4\)\); console.log\('sample vertex mid: pos=', m.positions.slice\(180*3,180*3+3\), 'color=', m.colors.slice\(180*4,180*4+4\)\);")
